candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; matches Total revenue values and is standard main revenue line.
Duplicate total of Revenue; kept as secondary priority in case of label changes over time.
Finance-related income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Interest income, not operating revenue; excluded for REVT.
Comprehensive income, not revenue; excluded for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income total, not revenue; excluded for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Short-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability related to revenue recognition timing, not revenue itself.

variables.notes: Revenue and Total revenue are identical top-line figures; Revenue is chosen as primary with Total revenue as fallback in case of label changes.

candidates.why: Most likely portion of staff costs classified as operating cost that includes direct service delivery; best proxy for cost of sales among candidates.
Mixed income and expense bucket, not a pure cost-of-sales line; unsuitable for COGS.
Broad operating overhead including SG&A-type costs; better suited for SG&A than COGS.
Specific operating cost but typically part of overhead (SG&A) rather than direct COGS.
Remainder of other operating expenses; overhead rather than clearly direct cost of sales.
Explicit SG&A category, not COGS.
Net operating result, a subtotal including revenue and expenses; not a component cost line.
Financing cost, not operating COGS.
Balance sheet liability; not an income statement cost line for COGS.

variables.notes: Among available candidates, Employee benefits expense - remaining is the most plausible direct service/production-related cost component, while other candidates are overhead, mixed, or subtotal items.

candidates.why: Compensation-related overhead typically included in SG&A; explicitly share-based.
Mixed income/expense line; not a pure SG&A component so excluded per instructions.
Broad operating overhead bucket; strong SG&A component candidate.
Remainder of other operating expenses; also overhead/SG&A-type costs.
Explicit SG&A line; core SG&A component.
Special operating items including share-based expenses; treated as SG&A-related overhead adjustments.
Equity reserve, not period SG&A expense; excluded.

variables.notes: Includes explicit SG&A line plus major overhead buckets and share-based compensation items. Excludes totals and mixed income/expense lines per instructions.
No research & development-related line items are present in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews, so XRD is treated as missing/zero.

candidates.row_label: Interest on obligations under finance leases
candidates.why: Specific interest expense on lease obligations; valid secondary XINT line.
Primary general interest expense line; best match for XINT.
Represents profit attributable to minority shareholders, not interest expense; should not be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest expense; good tertiary XINT candidate.
Equity component for minority shareholders, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest on obligations under finance leases
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Interest expenses is the primary general interest expense line, with lease-specific interest lines as fallbacks. Non-controlling interests lines are excluded as they are equity, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income allocation, not a balance sheet equity amount; excluded for BE.
Appears to represent parent equity for the latest year; secondary choice behind the more consistently populated Total shareholders equity.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders/owners (excludes non-controlling interests); best match for BE.
Includes non-controlling interests; not preferred for BE when parent equity is available.
Technical balancing line, not the main equity amount.
Technical balancing line, not the main equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line; not appropriate for BE.
Total of both sides of balance sheet; not an equity component.

variables.notes: Total shareholders equity is clearly equity attributable to owners (Total equity minus Non-controlling interests) and is populated across years; Equity - Total is retained as a secondary label for compatibility with earlier reporting formats.

candidates.why: Represents income attributable to non-controlling shareholders; valid as an MIB income measure but balance sheet amount is preferred for BE+MIB denominator.
Balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling equity interests; primary choice for MIB.
Income statement total for minority interests; useful alternate label for historical consistency.

variables.notes: Balance sheet Non-controlling interests is primary for the equity-based MIB component; income statement minority-interest lines are included as alternates in case of label changes or data availability differences.
